headlines.title: OpenAI files for IPO as AI investment race intensifies
headlines.description: OpenAI announced Monday afternoon that it has filed to offer its stock on public markets, just a week after its chief rival, Anthropic did the same.“We recently submitted a confidential S-1,” the ChatGPT maker said in a post on X, referring to the formal name of the filing for an initial public offering.

headlines.title: Apple renames Siri as ‘Siri AI’ with new push into artificial intelligence
headlines.description: The overhaul puts Siri into more direct competition with modern AI assistants such as ChatGPT.

headlines.title: Auburn student whose body was found after going missing in Japan was on a ‘decompression’ hike
headlines.description: An Auburn University student who died in Japan after going off on a solo hike away from his family enjoyed long strolls for “decompression” and wouldn’t have wanted to harm himself, a family friend said Monday

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Creative Ways to Cut Down Expenses and Save Some Extra Cash
headlines.description: Looking for ways to cut down on some expenses? Codie Sanchez, author of "Main Street Millionaire" and founder of Contrarian Thinking, joins TODAY's Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones with ways to save some extra cash. Tips include negotiating on everything from streaming services to gym memberships, being open and vocal about your budgeting goals, investing in essential businesses and more.

headlines.title: U.S. economy adds 172,000 jobs in May, unemployment steady at 4.3%
headlines.description: The U.S. economy added 172,000 jobs in May despite a growing energy and inflation crisis triggered by the ongoing war in Iran. Editor-in-Chief at Investopedia, Caleb Silver, breaks down the latest economic news, showing a resilient job market.

headlines.title: National Average for a Gallon of Regular Gas Dips by 17 Cents
headlines.description: The national average for a gallon of regular gas is now sitting at $4.22, down 17 cents from one week ago. Experts warn due to uncertainty in the Strait of Hormuz and the summer’s increased demand for gas, big price drops in the near future are unlikely.

headlines.title: Business in America: GM CEO Mary Barra
headlines.description: In our series “Business in America,” NBC News’ Christine Romans talks to the CEO of the biggest American car company about how A.I. is changing the very way cars are made, how gas prices are affecting business, and competition with China.

headlines.title: How shoppers who pay in cash are subsidizing Americans’ credit card reward points
headlines.description: A Harvard study estimates that people who pay with cash and debit cards are subsidizing $30 billion a year in points and perks for credit card users.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Scott Pelley alleges CBS leadership pushed for ‘the president’s version of events’
headlines.description: The former “60 Minutes” correspondent accused CBS News chief Bari Weiss of political interference and said she should be removed from her position.
